title: brand-profile
description: Per-brand parameters that specialize brand-presenter for a specific host (bunty/davendra/nex/...).

characterId.description: Go Bananas character ID for identity-locking generations.

hostPersona.description: Short descriptor of the host's visual + tonal style.

subjectDomains.description: Topics the presenter is typically used for.

triggerPhrases.description: Phrases in user input that should route to this brand profile.

introAsset.description: Relative path to the intro image inside this skill's assets/.

outroAsset.description: Relative path to the outro image inside this skill's assets/.

voiceNotes.description: Free-form notes about voice tone, pacing, accent.

scriptStyle.description: How the presenter's commentary script is shaped (e.g., 'cricket play-by-play', 'executive summary').
